# opnsense_interface_bridge (Resource)

Manages a bridge interface on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `device` (String) Assigned bridge device name (auto-assigned by OPNsense).
- `enable_stp` (Boolean) Enable spanning tree on the bridge.
- `members` (Set of String) Member interfaces of the bridge.
- `protocol` (String) Spanning-tree protocol: rstp or stp.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
